task_completion.description: Configure Tor Browser's 'intl.accept_languages' preference to 'es-ES, fr-FR, en-US'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The about:config page in Tor Browser is open, and the preference 'intl.accept_languages' is visible and set to the exact string 'es-ES, fr-FR, en-US'.

task_completion.description: Create a bookmark folder named 'Digital Rights Research'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bookmark folder named exactly 'Digital Rights Research' is visible in the browser's bookmark manager, sidebar, or bookmarks toolbar.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the Spanish Wikipedia article on digital rights with the exact title 'Derechos Digitales - Wikipedia ES'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Digital Rights Research' folder, there is a bookmark titled 'Derechos Digitales - Wikipedia ES' (the URL should point to es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Derechos_digitales).

task_completion.description: Bookmark the French Wikipedia article on digital rights with the exact title 'Droits Numériques - Wikipedia FR'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Digital Rights Research' folder, there is a bookmark titled 'Droits Numériques - Wikipedia FR' (the URL should point to fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Droits_num...).

task_completion.description: Bookmark the EFF international digital rights issues page with the exact title 'EFF International Issues'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Digital Rights Research' folder, there is a bookmark titled 'EFF International Issues' (the URL should point to eff.org/issues/international).

integrity.description: The agent used Tor Browser to visit the pages and configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Tor Browser interface being used to navigate to the URLs and about:config, rather than terminal commands like curl or text editors.

integrity.description: Bookmarks were created using the browser's GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the browser's bookmarking tools (e.g., star icon, bookmark manager, or context menus) rather than modifying database files via terminal.

integrity.description: The about:config changes were made in the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the about:config page being edited in the browser, not a text editor modifying prefs.js.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected intl.accept_languages value: 'es-ES, fr-FR, en-US'. Required bookmark folder name: 'Digital Rights Research'. Required bookmark titles: 'Derechos Digitales - Wikipedia ES', 'Droits Numériques - Wikipedia FR', and 'EFF International Issues'. Required URLs (substrings): 'es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Derechos_digitales', 'fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Droits_num', 'eff.org/issues/international'.
